input: I was charged twice for my subscription last month and need a refund.

input: I requested a refund for my annual plan but haven't received it yet.

notes: Ambiguous between billing and account; primary issue is login

input: After updating my payment method, the app won't let me access premium features.
notes: Ambiguous between billing and technical; payment-related access issue

input: I changed my email address and now my subscription seems to have disappeared.
notes: Ambiguous between account and billing; triggered by account change

input: I keep getting an error when trying to cancel my paid membership.
